rationale: Review 2 correctly identifies a verifiable inaccuracy: the module docstring claims the finrank lemmas 'combine the normal form with intermediate-field scalar restriction,' but neither lemma invokes any of the normal-form results (`exists_add_mul_of_mem_sup_adjoin_sq`, `mem_sup_adjoin_sq`) — they use minpoly machinery and `Module.finrank_mul_finrank` independently. Acting on Review 2 fixes a misleading rationale statement; Review 1 approves without catching it.
